description: Modulation → amp envelope timing (amp.decay). A stepped unipolar LFO ramps the amp decay on a tonal synth hit on every beat; as the decay opens, tails ring across the gaps so more of the render stays above threshold. Proves the amp-envelope-timing modulation path. (amp.release is inert for one-shot step triggers — no note-off — so decay carries this axis.) Un-modulated keeps ~0.26 s above -40 dBFS; modulated ~1.1 s — threshold 0.6 s sits between.

assertions.name: audio_present
assertions.comment: the synth hits must be audible

assertions.name: decay_lengthens_tails
assertions.comment: decay modulation fills the gaps with tails; un-modulated baseline is ~0.26 s above -40 dBFS
